Data Processing Addendum (HK PDPO) — Schedule between VerdantRise Holdings Limited (incorporated in Hong Kong, Main Board issuer acting as data user) and CloudQuill Data Services Pte Ltd (processor, Singapore), effective 2026-01-10.
Processing covers HR onboarding for VerdantRise group employees and fund investor onboarding for VerdantRise Growth Umbrella Fund LP; personal data relates to identifiable individuals as defined under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance.
Cross-border transfer: hosting in Singapore is authorised subject to encryption in transit/at rest and Hong Kong model contractual safeguards attached as Annex A; no onward transfers outside APAC are approved under this Schedule.
No personal data is currently transferred to the United States, and no biometric templates are collected in these workflows.
Data minimisation: employment forms capture only name, role, work email, payroll alias, and emergency contact name; optional fields and any identity document numbers are suppressed unless a legal basis is documented.
Retention: HR records are retained 7 years post-termination; fund AML/KYC records are retained 6 years after relationship end or longer if required by Hong Kong law; access logs rotate every 90 days.
Consent withdrawal: where consent is the lawful basis (e.g., staff wellness benefits), individuals may email privacy@verdantrise.example.hk to withdraw; processing based on legal obligation or contract will continue where applicable.
DSAR: access and correction requests may be submitted using Form VR-DA-18 to dpo@verdantrise.example.hk; acknowledgements within 7 days and substantive responses within 40 days will be provided, consistent with PDPO ss. 18 and 22.
Erasure: requests will be granted where data is no longer necessary and no statutory retention applies; processor deletion certificates will be recorded under Change Ticket CQ-HK-ER-2026-014.
MNPI controls: datasets exported under this DPA exclude information that would constitute non-public, price-sensitive information as defined under the Securities and Futures Ordinance; wall-crossing for M&A diligence is governed separately under the Insider List Policy.
Data export approval VR-HK-XBT-2026-011 was completed on 2026-01-09 by Ms. Tamsin Yiu, Compliance Director, with two-factor approval; no live export is pending at the time of this memo.
For the proposed acquisition scenario involving Amber Harbor Advisory Ltd by a VerdantRise subsidiary, only aggregated staffing metrics will be shared with external counsel, and all names will be pseudonymised prior to transfer.
Security testing: breach notification drills concluded on 2025-12-15; this note does not indicate any incident; queries may be directed to Mr. Koji Ng at compliance@verdantrise.example.hk.
Audit: CloudQuill shall provide an annual report and allow on-site review on 10 business days’ notice; prior findings CQ-AUD-2025-07 are closed, with remediation verified on 2025-11-30.
